title: CosmoFab
description:
** This game is currently in beta.

** Bugs may occur, and game balance and content are subject to change.

CosmoFab is a factory automation game where you build automated factories through mining, construction, production, and logistics.

Designed to simplify complex production lines, it offers a streamlined experience with a playtime of approximately 10–20 hours.

Your goal is to defend your factory against hostile creatures within a limited area, expand your production, and complete your mission.

Explore and mine resources to produce a variety of items.

Expand your base by efficiently connecting production facilities and transport lines, and build your own automated factory system.

While carrying out your mission, hostile creatures will continuously attack your base.

Build walls and defensive turrets to protect your facilities, and carefully manage both expansion and defense at the same time.

Research new technologies to unlock faster production and stronger defensive systems.

Through continuous research, you can gain access to more advanced equipment and technologies.

Plexa is a planetary exploration unit available from the very beginning of the game.

It plays a key role in scouting the planet and defending your base, and can be upgraded to become even more powerful.

Use Plexa to explore unknown planets and complete your mission.
description_short: CosmoFab is a factory-building game focused on mining, production, and automation. Mine resources and build production lines to create a fully automated industrial system. Defend your base against relentless hostile creatures, explore the planet, and complete your mission.
